ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "gaming_alias" TEXT /* Gaming alias or handle used by the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Player's biography or about section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., Classic, Assassins) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game mode */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the game mode (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game mode is currently active and available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the player in this game mode */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills for the player in this game mode */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime for the player in this game mode (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game log */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session ended */,
  "level_reached" INTEGER /* Highest level reached in the game session */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Player's score in the game session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode for which the statistic applies */,
  "fastest_win" INTEGER /* Fastest win time for this game mode (in seconds) */,
  "longest_play_session" INTEGER /* Longest play session for this game mode (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistic */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the game mode */,
  "average_kills_per_game" REAL /* Average number of kills per game */,
  "average_playtime_per_game" INTEGER /* Average playtime per game (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who provided the feedback */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode for which the feedback applies */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the player (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment left by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is published and visible to other players */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the feedback */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_feedback_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, admin, moderator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_game_logs, edit_player_info) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for earning the achievement */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for earning the achievement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement earned */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session (in seconds) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the session (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Player's score in the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
